NATIONAL BUREAU OF STATISTICS

  • Data Release Calendar

  • 17

    Notifications

    Stakeholders Convene in Katsina for First Bi-annual Meeting of the National Consultative Committee on Statistics (NCCS)

    Thursday, May 22, 2025

    NBS Launches General Household Survey (GHS) Panel Wave 5: Tracking Household Resilience Over Time

    Saturday, November 23, 2024

    National Bureau of Statistics Celebrates African Statistics Day 2024.

    Friday, November 22, 2024

    LAUNCH OF THE NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SAMPLE CENSUS REPORT 2022

    Friday, June 28, 2024

    FCT CIVIL SERVICE COMMISSION CHAIRMAN'S VISIT TO NBS

    Friday, June 28, 2024

    COURTESY CALL BY THE COUNTRY REPRESENTATIVE OF IMF, DR. CHRISTIAN EBEKE, ON THE STATISTICIAN GENERAL OF THE FEDERATION, PRINCE ADEYEMI ADENIRAN

    Thursday, June 13, 2024

    STAKEHOLDERS DIALOGUE ON OPERATIONALIZING THE MULTIDIMENSIONAL POVERTY INDEX (MPI) IN NIGERIA

    Tuesday, June 11, 2024

    COURTESY CALL ON THE STATISTICIAN-GENERAL OF THE FEDERATION AND CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER OF NATIONAL BUREAU OF STATISTICS BY THE ABUJA CHAPTER EXECUTIVES OF NIGERIAN STATISTICAL ASSOCIATION (NSA)

    Wednesday, June 5, 2024

    COURTESY CALL ON THE STATISTICIAN-GENERAL OF THE FEDERATION AND CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER OF NATIONAL BUREAU OF STATISTICS BY THE COMMITTEE ON RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT OF REVENUE MOBILIZATION ALLOCATION AND FISCAL COMMISSION (RMAFC)

    Thursday, May 30, 2024

    Keynote Address by the Statistician General of the Federation and Chief Executive Officer, National Bureau of Statistics, at the Sensitisation Workshop for Stakeholders on the GDP and CPI Rebasing Exercise, held on the 23rd May 2024

    Wednesday, May 29, 2024

    PRESS BRIEFING FOR THE LAUNCH OF THE COST OF A HEALTHY DIET INDICATOR

    Wednesday, January 31, 2024

    Nigeria Launches its Most Extensive National Measure of Multidimensional Poverty.

    Thursday, November 17, 2022

    The National Bureau of Statistics in collaboration with UNICEF launches the 2021 Multiple Indicator Cluster Survey/ National Immunization Coverage Survey Report

    Tuesday, August 16, 2022

    PRESIDENT BUHARI APPROVES APPOINTMENT OF SEMIU ADEYEMI ADENIRAN AS STATISTICIAN-GENERAL OF THE FEDERATION AND CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER OF THE NATIONAL BUREAU OF STATISTICS

    Friday, May 20, 2022

    NBS-ILO-FMLE 2022 National Child and Forced Labour Survey

    Thursday, March 31, 2022

    1st Bi-annual Meeting of the National Consultative Committee on Statistics (NCCS)

    Thursday, March 24, 2022

    Courtesy Visits From The United Nations Childrens Fund (UNICEF)

    Friday, October 8, 2021

The NBS website is set to undergo scheduled maintenance and will be temporarily unavailable from:.
